title: Build connected AI: Orchestrate tools and agents with registries and ADK
summary: Google Cloud's Agent Development Kit enables building production agents that access enterprise data across SaaS and on-premises systems. The toolkit uses Agent Registry to securely connect agents to other agents and tools, and supports Model Context Protocol servers for standardized tool integration.
writeup: This video from Google Cloud Tech covers building production AI agents with the Agent Development Kit (ADK), which connects agents to enterprise data across SaaS and on-premises systems. It centers on Agent Registry for securely linking agents to other agents and tools, and on Model Context Protocol servers for standardized tool integration. The takeaways are practical: ADK supports multi-agent orchestration, API abstraction across diverse systems, and MCP-based tool connections.
